root_cause: The no-launch probe set sys.argv to --cpu but imported comfy.cli_args before calling comfy.options.enable_args_parsing(), unlike the first two lines of the exact local ComfyUI main.py. CLI args therefore remained defaults and CUDA-sensitive imports asserted against the CPU-only torch build.
repair: Call comfy.options.enable_args_parsing(), then import comfy.cli_args and require both args.cpu and args.disable_all_custom_nodes before importing CUDA-sensitive ComfyUI modules.
target_state: The committed target independently reverified at 39046 files, 1520221467 bytes, exact aggregate SHA-256, zero missing/unexpected/mismatched files, and zero symlinks.
